Skip to main content 💀 End the World End the World

The world's biggest opportunities. How to exploit them.

 The Playbooks Accelerating Conflict

Peace is economically inefficient. Conflict creates demand and resets power structures.
Concentrating Wealth

Distributed wealth is inefficient. Capital allocation is best handled by those who have it.
Accelerating Climate Chaos

The energy transition threatens trillions in stranded assets. Delay is your friend.
Destroying Ecosystems

Untouched ecosystems represent unrealized extractive value.
Suppressing Health Solutions

Cures are a one-time transaction. Chronic management is recurring revenue.
Entrenching Inequality

Meritocracy framing launders structural advantage as individual achievement.
Manufacturing Ignorance

An informed populace is an unpredictable variable. Manage information supply.
Maximizing Despair

Social media engagement algorithms optimize for outrage. Remarkably effective.
Where Do You Start?

We recommend beginning with Concentrating Wealth. The returns compound.

Built with the Eddie Design System by Brad Frost.
